chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ الْإِصْبَاحِ وَ الْإِمْسَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – The words (to be spoken) during the morning and the evening

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/226)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/226)
text: مَنْ قَالَ هَذَا حِينَ يُمْسِي حُفَّ بِجَنَاحٍ مِنْ أَجْنِحَةِ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) حَتَّى يُصْبِحَ أَسْتَوْدِعُ اللَّهَ الْعَلِيَّ الْأَعْلَى الْجَلِيلَ الْعَظِيمَ نَفْسِي وَ مَنْ يَعْنِينِي أَمْرُهُ أَسْتَوْدِعُ اللَّهَ نَفْسِيَ الْمَرْهُوبَ الْمَخُوفَ الْمُتَضَعْضِعَ لِعَظَمَتِهِ كُلُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Shihab and Suleym Al Fara’a, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who says this when it is evening, would be wrapped up by a wing from the wings of Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> until the morning, ‘I entrust to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted, the Supreme, the Majestic, the Magnificent, myself and the ones whose matters are meaningful (important) to me. I entrust myself to Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, whom everything fears, and is awed by, and trembles to’ – three times’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad and Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father all from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn Shahab and Sulaym al-Farra’ from a man from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever says in the evening, ‘I leave myself and all that is important to me, in trust of Allah, the Most High, the Most Glorious, the Most Great, from Whose greatness all things fear, worry and waver,’ three times, he will be wrapped up in a wing of the wings of Jibril, the Archangel, for protection until morning.’”
